get.description: Redirects to Google OAuth authorization page

post.description: Exchange Google ID token for app tokens (for mobile apps)
Authenticate user with email and password, return access and refresh tokens

401.description: Invalid credentials or email not verified

post.description: Invalidate refresh token and logout from current session
Invalidate all refresh tokens for the current user
Get new access and refresh tokens using a valid refresh token
Create a new user account with email, username and password
Resend verification email with new code

404.description: User not found or already verified

409.description: Verification pending or resend too fast

post.description: Verify user's email with 6-digit verification code

200.description: Email verified — returns user with key_couple

post.description: Accept a couple invitation sent to the user
Send a couple invitation to another user using their invite key

parameters.description: Invite request with partner's invite key
parameters.name: request

404.description: User with invite key not found

delete.description: Initiate breakup of current couple relationship (grace period applies)

get.description: Aggregate endpoint — returns all data needed for the Home screen in one request
Get memories for the current user with pagination

parameters.description: Number of items per page (max 100, default 20)
parameters.name: limit

200.description: List of memories with pagination info

post.description: Create a new memory (special moment) entry
Log a new mood entry with type and intensity

get.description: Get mood history with optional date range filtering

delete.description: Delete a mood entry by ID

get.description: Get all reminders for the current user

post.description: Create a new reminder with title, time and recurrence
Get a presigned URL for uploading files to storage

400.description: Invalid input or file too large

get.description: Get all activity streaks for the current couple
Get streak for a specific activity type for the current couple

post.description: Manually record an activity for the couple streak. Prefer POST /moods which triggers this automatically.

get.description: Get current authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Update device information (FCM token, platform) for push notifications

get.description: Get user information by user ID

patch.description: Update user profile information by ID

message.example: Vui lòng kiểm tra email để xác nhận tài khoản.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
